name: Whirlpool v5b — Lorentzian Transformer with Flash Lorentz Attention
blurb: First non-Euclidean, Lorentzian geometry transformer in the competition. Replaces dot-product attention with Minkowski inner product on the hyperboloid manifold, using a custom Flash Lorentz Attention Triton kernel. Tri-block architecture with 8 curvature-progressive orbits through 3 shared blocks (23.9M stored, 62M effective params). d=768, 12H GQA 6:1, 5x MLP with fused LeakyReLU(0.5)². Parallel eval: 8 GPUs each run a different TTT hyperparameter, best reported. 1-seed: 1.5918.
author: tmancino
